outages.headline: Global base oils in for long recovery despite Hormuz reopening
outages.summary: Global base oils markets are facing a long recovery period as supply constraints and geopolitical tensions continue to reshape the industry, ICIS head of refining and base oils analytics Michael Connolly said on Thursday. The situation is particularly acute for Group III base oils, where recovery timelines are significantly longer due to structural disruptions, including ...

outages.headline: Qatar Offers First Crude Loadings to Buyers Since War Began
outages.summary: Qatar is tendering crude for loading outside the Strait of Hormuz in July and August, in what is likely the first Qatari crude offering to buyers since the Iran war began on February 28, trade sources told Reuters on Friday. Qatar’s state firm QatarEnergy has issued a tender, which closes on June 29, offering buyers to load or lift Marine Qatar, Marine Land, and al-Shaheen crude grades via ship-to-ship (STS) transfers between the offshore waters of Fujairah in the United Arab Emirates and Sohar in Oman, per a tender document Reuters has seen.…
